## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Compatibility

- [ ] Report action remains backward compatible.
- [ ] Latest-report sensor remains backward compatible.
- [ ] Existing report paths remain unchanged.
- [ ] Existing config entries require no manual migration.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] HACS validation passes.
- [ ] Hassfest passes.
- [ ] JavaScript syntax checks pass.
- [ ] Documentation is in English.
- [ ] Logs and screenshots contain no sensitive information.

## Runtime testing

Describe the Home Assistant installation, upgrade, panel, and report tests performed.
